# GEMM / Quantization PRs

Optimization recipe: Inspect scale layout, accumulator type, tile/schedule choice, epilogue fusion, and partial-tile guards before deriving a candidate.

NCU first look: Tensor pipe %, DRAM/L2 bytes, active cycles, register pressure, and scale-load traffic.

## Inspection Questions

- Which tile/schedule and scale layout made the PR worthwhile?
- Which shape family or tail case was protected by tests/benchmarks?
